structuredDiscovery.signature: AskUserQuestion with structured options in init Step 4B
structuredDiscovery.description: Replaces prose-based Q&A with structured AskUserQuestion calls using pre-filled options, 4 sub-questions per call, across all 10 discovery areas.

granularityPreference.signature: targetSetCount passed as runtime parameter to roadmapper
granularityPreference.description: User specifies desired number of sets (granularity preference). Passed as runtime input to roadmapper prompt, not persisted in config.

summaryConfirmation.signature: Summary review and confirmation step before roadmap generation
summaryConfirmation.description: After all discovery questions answered, present summary of all answers for user review and confirmation before proceeding to roadmap generation.

structured-questions.description: Init Step 4B must use AskUserQuestion with pre-filled options (2-5 options per question). Freeform input via 'Other' option as escape hatch.

batch-grouping.description: Questions grouped into batches of 4 sub-questions per AskUserQuestion call, following progressive disclosure.

granularity-as-runtime.description: Target set count is passed as runtime parameter to roadmapper prompt, NOT persisted in config.json.

definition.scope: Redesign the init flow Step 4B to use structured AskUserQuestion with pre-filled options, add granularity preference, and add summary confirmation before roadmap generation.

tasks.description: Rewrite init Step 4B to use structured AskUserQuestion with pre-filled options (4 sub-questions per call)
tasks.acceptance: All 10 discovery areas use structured questions with pre-filled options

tasks.description: Add granularity preference question collecting target set count
tasks.acceptance: User can specify desired number of sets

tasks.description: Add summary and confirmation step presenting all answers before roadmap generation
tasks.acceptance: Summary is displayed and user confirms before proceeding

tasks.description: Update roadmapper role to accept targetSetCount as runtime parameter
tasks.acceptance: Roadmapper receives and respects granularity preference

acceptance: Init Step 4B uses structured AskUserQuestion with pre-filled options
Granularity preference is collected and passed to roadmapper
Summary confirmation step exists before roadmap generation
